offer: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, billing discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile customer billing data with CRM records instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inconsistencies between billing data and CRM records
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on billing issues

try_it: Let users try manual data entry for 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the process
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing records
